commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Now I know that the LORD is greater than all gods: for in the thing in which they dealt proudly he was above them. I am now more convinced of this truth. Jethro instructed his family in these principles. The Rechabites were his descendants. (1 Paralipomenon ii. 55; Jeremias xxxv. ) (Menochius) Proudly. Hebrew, "because in the thing in which they did proudly, he was against, or above them. "Something must be supplied. God turned the wisdom and arms of the Egyptians to their own confusion.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
